commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=220280e47af139388656423c3ce7514f74444663)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes the `description` frontmatter in five `skills/*/SKILL.md` files to add skill-type prefixes, `WHEN:` trigger phrases, and selected `INVOKES:` routing text.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a skill frontmatter PR, not a bug report with a failing runtime reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action needs maintainer judgment on the frontmatter convention plus contributor-supplied real behavior proof, so it is not a safe repair-lane candidate right now.

target.title: sensei: improve skill frontmatter for cross-model trigger accuracy
target.body:
Closes #4

Applies the [Sensei](https://github.com/kvenkatrajan/agent-skills/tree/main/skills/sensei) audit's frontmatter recommendations to all 5 skills. Each `description` now includes a skill-type prefix and `WHEN:` trigger phrases for cross-model routing accuracy; 3 skills also gain `INVOKES:` for routing clarity.

## Changes (frontmatter only)

| Skill | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| agent-transcript | Low | Medium-High (UTILITY + WHEN) |
| autoreview | Low | High (WORKFLOW + WHEN + INVOKES) |
| crabbox | Low | Medium-High (WORKFLOW + WHEN) |
| handoff | Low | Medium-High (UTILITY + WHEN) |
| session-viewer | Low | High (UTILITY + WHEN + INVOKES: agent-transcript) |

All descriptions are ≤60 words, >150 chars, and avoid `DO NOT USE FOR:` (per Sensei's cross-model guidance).

## Out of scope (tracked in #4 as follow-ups)
- Split oversized `crabbox/SKILL.md` body (~4.5k words) into references
- Add `tests/<skill>/triggers.test.ts` scaffolding
- Add `scripts/validate-skills` referenced by `AGENTS.md`
target.author: spboyer
